article_title: Over 300 Humanoid Robots Will Race Alongside 12,000 Humans in Beijing's Second Robot Half-Marathon on April 19

content_preview.title: Over 300 Humanoid Robots Will Race Alongside 12,000 Humans in Beijing's Second Robot Half-Marathon on April 19
content_preview.summary: Beijing's E-Town district is hosting the world's largest humanoid robot race, with a fivefold increase in robot participants and a new autonomous navigation category.
content_preview.body_excerpt:
## Overview

More than 300 humanoid robots representing 26 brands will line up alongside 12,000 human runners on April 19 in Beijing's Yizhuang Economic-Technological Development Area for the second annual humanoid robot half-marathon, [according to the South China Morning Post](https://www.scmp.com/sport/other-sport/article/3348023/humans-robots-run-together-again-beijing-yizhuang-half-marathon-organisers-confirm). The 21-kilometer course will start at Kechuang 17th Street near Tongming Lake an...
